title: SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 1 West Main Street Suite 303 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 857-7780 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 857-7780 Jackson County Intake (541) 646-3461 Josephine or Douglas County Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas, Jackson, and Josephine Counties Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries Medicare Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - FOSTER GRANDPARENT PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - RSVP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK
